import Mathlib

namespace Erdos1104

/-- The largest chromatic number of a triangle-free graph on `n` vertices. -/
noncomputable def triangleFreeMaxChromatic (n : ℕ) : ℕ∞ := by
  classical
  exact (Finset.univ.filter fun G : SimpleGraph (Fin n) ↦ G.CliqueFree 3).sup
    (fun G ↦ G.chromaticNumber)

/-- Adding isolated vertices shows that the maximum chromatic number of a
triangle-free graph is monotone in the number of vertices. -/
theorem triangleFreeMaxChromatic_monotone : Monotone triangleFreeMaxChromatic := by
  sorry

end Erdos1104

import Mathlib

namespace Erdos1104

/-- The largest chromatic number of a triangle-free simple graph on `n` labelled vertices. -/
noncomputable def triangleFreeMaxChromatic (n : ℕ) : ℕ := by
  classical
  exact Finset.univ.sup fun G : SimpleGraph (Fin n) ↦
    if G.CliqueFree 3 then ENat.toNat G.chromaticNumber else 0

theorem triangleFreeMaxChromatic_zero : triangleFreeMaxChromatic 0 = 0 := by
  simp [triangleFreeMaxChromatic, SimpleGraph.chromaticNumber_eq_zero_of_isEmpty]

end Erdos1104

/-- The limit inferior of the `k`-th roots of a positive real sequence. -/
noncomputable def rootLiminf (x : ℕ → ℝ) : ℝ :=
  liminf (fun k : ℕ => Real.rpow (x k) (1 / (k : ℝ))) atTop

/-- The limit inferior of the ratios obtained by shifting the index by `m`. -/
noncomputable def fixedShiftLiminf (x : ℕ → ℝ) (m : ℕ) : ℝ :=
  liminf (fun k : ℕ => x (k + m) / x k) atTop

private lemma rootLiminf_ge_of_eventually_shift
    (x : ℕ → ℝ) (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m) (hx : ∀ k, 0 < x k)
    (c : ℝ) (hc : 0 < c)
    (hstep : ∀ᶠ k in atTop, c * x k ≤ x (k + m)) :
    Real.rpow c (1 / m) ≤ rootLiminf x := by
  sorry

private lemma eventually_shift_of_lt_fixedShiftLiminf
    (x : ℕ → ℝ) (m : ℕ) (hx : ∀ k, 0 < x k)
    (c : ℝ) (hc : c < fixedShiftLiminf x m) :
    ∀ᶠ k in atTop, c * x k ≤ x (k + m) := by
  contrapose! hc;
  refine' csSup_le _ _ <;> norm_num;
  · exact ⟨ 0, ⟨ 0, fun n hn => div_nonneg ( le_of_lt ( hx _ ) ) ( le_of_lt ( hx _ ) ) ⟩ ⟩;
  · intro b k hk; rw [ Filter.frequently_atTop ] at hc; rcases hc k with ⟨ n, hn₁, hn₂ ⟩ ; nlinarith [ hx n, hx ( n + m ), hk n hn₁, mul_div_cancel₀ ( x ( n + m ) ) ( ne_of_gt ( hx n ) ) ] ;

private lemma fixedShiftLiminf_rpow_le_of_all_lt
    (L B : ℝ) (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m) (hL : 0 < L)
    (h : ∀ c : ℝ, 0 < c → c < L → Real.rpow c (1 / m) ≤ B) :
    Real.rpow L (1 / m) ≤ B := by
  -- By continuity of $c \mapsto c^{1/m}$ at $c = L$, we have $L^{1/m} = \lim_{c \to L^-} c^{1/m}$.
  have h_cont : Filter.Tendsto (fun c => c.rpow (1 / m : ℝ)) (nhdsWithin L (Set.Iio L)) (nhds (L.rpow (1 / m : ℝ))) := by
    exact Filter.Tendsto.mono_left ( Filter.tendsto_id.rpow_const <| Or.inr <| by positivity ) nhdsWithin_le_nhds;
  exact le_of_tendsto h_cont ( Filter.eventually_of_mem ( Ioo_mem_nhdsLT hL ) fun x hx => h x hx.1 hx.2 )

  intro x m hm hx hL
  apply fixedShiftLiminf_rpow_le_of_all_lt (fixedShiftLiminf x m) (rootLiminf x) m hm hL
  intro c hc hcL
  apply rootLiminf_ge_of_eventually_shift x m hm hx c hc

/-- Lexicographic product of simple graphs. -/
def lexGraph {α β : Type} (G : SimpleGraph α) (H : SimpleGraph β) :
    SimpleGraph (α × β) where
  Adj x y := G.Adj x.1 y.1 ∨ (x.1 = y.1 ∧ H.Adj x.2 y.2)
  symm x y h := by
    rcases h with h | ⟨hxy, h⟩
    · exact Or.inl (G.symm h)
    · exact Or.inr ⟨hxy.symm, H.symm h⟩
  loopless := ⟨by
    intro x h
    rcases h with h | ⟨_, h⟩
    · exact G.loopless.irrefl _ h
    · exact H.loopless.irrefl _ h⟩

noncomputable def lexColorProduct (G H : TwoColoring) : TwoColoring where
  V := G.V × H.V

  -- Let $S$ be a finite subset of vertices in $lexGraph G H$ such that $S$ forms a clique.
  have h_clique : ∀ (S : Finset (α × β)), (lexGraph G H).IsNClique S.card S → S.card ≤ G.cliqueNum * H.cliqueNum := by
    intro S hS
    set T := S.image Prod.fst with hT_def
    have hT_clique : G.IsClique T := by
      intro x hx y hy hxy; simp_all +decide [ SimpleGraph.isNClique_iff ] ;
      obtain ⟨ u, hu ⟩ := hx; obtain ⟨ v, hv ⟩ := hy; specialize hS hu hv; simp_all +decide [ lexGraph ] ;
    have hT_card : T.card ≤ G.cliqueNum := by
      apply_rules [ SimpleGraph.IsClique.card_le_cliqueNum ]
    have hS_card : S.card ≤ T.card * H.cliqueNum := by
      have hS_card : ∀ x ∈ T, (Finset.filter (fun y => y.1 = x) S).card ≤ H.cliqueNum := by
        intro x hx
        have h_fiber_clique : ∀ y ∈ Finset.filter (fun y => y.1 = x) S, ∀ z ∈ Finset.filter (fun y => y.1 = x) S, y ≠ z → H.Adj y.2 z.2 := by
          intro y hy z hz hyz; have := hS.1; simp_all +decide [ SimpleGraph.isNClique_iff ] ;
          have := this hy.1 hz.1; simp_all +decide [ lexGraph ] ;
        have h_fiber_clique : H.IsClique (Finset.image Prod.snd (Finset.filter (fun y => y.1 = x) S)) := by
          intro y hy z hz hyz; aesop;

def ramsey2 : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ
  | 0, _ => 0
  | 1, _ => 1
  | _ + 2, 0 => 0
  | _ + 2, 1 => 1
  | s + 2, t + 2 => ramsey2 (s + 1) (t + 2) + ramsey2 (s + 2) (t + 1)
termination_by s t => s + t

theorem ramsey_twoColor_le_add : ∀ s t : ℕ, 2 ≤ s → 2 ≤ t → ramsey2 s t ≤ ramsey2 (s - 1) t + ramsey2 s (t - 1) := by
  intro s t hs ht
  obtain ⟨s, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le hs
  obtain ⟨t, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le ht
  rw [show 2 + s = s + 2 by omega, show 2 + t = t + 2 by omega]
  rw [show s + 2 - 1 = s + 1 by omega, show t + 2 - 1 = t + 1 by omega]
  exact (ramsey2.eq_5 s t).le

/-- A two-colouring of the edges of a finite complete graph.  An edge is red
when it belongs to `redGraph`, and blue otherwise. -/
structure TwoColoring where
  Vertex : Type
  fintypeVertex : Fintype Vertex
  redGraph : SimpleGraph Vertex

attribute [instance] TwoColoring.fintypeVertex

/-- The largest cardinality of a red clique. -/
noncomputable def redCliqueNumber (G : TwoColoring) : ℕ :=
  G.redGraph.cliqueNum

/-- The largest cardinality of a blue clique. -/
noncomputable def blueCliqueNumber (G : TwoColoring) : ℕ :=
  G.redGraphᶜ.cliqueNum

/-- Lexicographic composition of two simple graphs. -/
def lexGraph {α β : Type} (G : SimpleGraph α) (H : SimpleGraph β) :
    SimpleGraph (α × β) where
  Adj x y := G.Adj x.1 y.1 ∨ (x.1 = y.1 ∧ H.Adj x.2 y.2)
  symm x y h := by
    rcases h with h | ⟨hxy, h⟩
    · exact Or.inl (G.symm h)
    · exact Or.inr ⟨hxy.symm, H.symm h⟩
  loopless := ⟨by
    intro x h
    rcases h with h | ⟨_, h⟩
    · exact G.loopless.irrefl _ h
    · exact H.loopless.irrefl _ h⟩

/-- The lexicographic product colouring: between distinct fibres use the first
colouring, and within each fibre use the second. -/
def lexColorProduct (G H : TwoColoring) : TwoColoring where
  Vertex := G.Vertex × H.Vertex
  fintypeVertex := inferInstance
  redGraph := lexGraph G.redGraph H.redGraph

private lemma cliqueNum_lexGraph_le_mul {α β : Type} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (G : SimpleGraph α) (H : SimpleGraph β) :
    (lexGraph G H).cliqueNum ≤ G.cliqueNum * H.cliqueNum := by
  -- Let $s$ be a maximal clique of the lexicographic product.
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ : ∃ s : Finset (α × β), (lexGraph G H).IsNClique (lexGraph G H).cliqueNum s := by
    exact SimpleGraph.exists_isNClique_cliqueNum
  -- Let T be the image of s under Prod.fst.
  set T := Finset.image Prod.fst s with hT_def
  have hT_card : T.card ≤ G.cliqueNum := by
    apply SimpleGraph.IsClique.card_le_cliqueNum;
    intro x hx y hy hxy;
    simp +zetaDelta at *;
    obtain ⟨ a, ha ⟩ := hx; obtain ⟨ b, hb ⟩ := hy; have := hs.1 ha hb; simp_all +decide [ lexGraph ] ;
  -- Each fibre $s \cap \{x\} \times \beta$ is a clique of $H$, hence has cardinality $\leq H.cliqueNum$.
  have h_fibre_card : ∀ x ∈ T, (s.filter (fun y => y.1 = x)).card ≤ H.cliqueNum := by
    intro x hx
    have h_fibre_clique : ∀ y ∈ s.filter (fun z => z.1 = x), ∀ z ∈ s.filter (fun z => z.1 = x), y ≠ z → H.Adj y.2 z.2 := by
      intro y hy z hz hyz; have := hs.1; simp_all +decide [ lexGraph ] ;
      have := this hy.1 hz.1; aesop;
    have h_fibre_clique_card : (Finset.image Prod.snd (s.filter (fun z => z.1 = x))).card ≤ H.cliqueNum := by
      apply_rules [ SimpleGraph.IsClique.card_le_cliqueNum ];
      intro y hy z hz hyz; aesop;
    rwa [ Finset.card_image_of_injOn ] at h_fibre_clique_card ; intro y hy z hz ; aesop;
  have h_card_s : s.card = Finset.sum T (fun x => (s.filter (fun y => y.1 = x)).card) := by
    exact Finset.card_eq_sum_card_image Prod.fst s
  exact hs.card_eq.symm ▸ h_card_s.symm ▸ le_trans ( Finset.sum_le_sum h_fibre_card ) ( by simpa [ mul_comm ] using Nat.mul_le_mul_right H.cliqueNum hT_card )

private lemma compl_lexGraph (G : TwoColoring) (H : TwoColoring) :
    (lexGraph G.redGraph H.redGraph)ᶜ = lexGraph G.redGraphᶜ H.redGraphᶜ := by
  ext ⟨x1, x2⟩ ⟨y1, y2⟩; simp +decide [ lexGraph ] ; by_cases h : x1 = y1 <;> simp +decide [ h ] ;

theorem lexicographicProduct_cliqueCaps : ∀ {a b c d : ℕ} {G H : TwoColoring}, redCliqueNumber G < a → blueCliqueNumber G < b → redCliqueNumber H < c → blueCliqueNumber H < d → redCliqueNumber (lexColorProduct G H) ≤ (a - 1) * (c - 1) ∧ blueCliqueNumber (lexColorProduct G H) ≤ (b - 1) * (d - 1) := by
  sorry

lemma eventually_affine_lower_of_shift
    (y : ℕ → ℝ) (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m) (c : ℝ)
    (h : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, c ≤ y (n + m) - y n) :
    ∃ B : ℝ, ∀ᶠ n in atTop, c / m * n + B ≤ y n := by
  obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀⟩ : ∃ N₀ : ℕ, ∀ n ≥ N₀, (c : ℝ) ≤ y (n + m) - y n := by
    simpa only [eventually_atTop] using h
  obtain ⟨B, hB⟩ : ∃ B : ℝ, ∀ n ∈ Finset.Ico N₀ (N₀ + m),
      B ≤ y n - (c / m) * n := by
    exact ⟨Finset.min' (Finset.image (fun n : ℕ => y n - c / m * n)
      (Finset.Ico N₀ (N₀ + m)))
      ⟨_, Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.left_mem_Ico.mpr (by omega))⟩,
      fun n hn => Finset.min'_le _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ hn)⟩
  refine ⟨B, eventually_atTop.2 ⟨N₀, ?_⟩⟩
  intro n hn
  induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
  | h n ih =>
    by_cases hn' : n < N₀ + m
    · have hmem : n ∈ Finset.Ico N₀ (N₀ + m) := Finset.mem_Ico.2 ⟨hn, hn'⟩
      linarith [hB n hmem]
    · have hmle : m ≤ n := by omega
      have hbase : N₀ ≤ n - m := by omega
      have hlt : n - m < n := Nat.sub_lt (by omega) hm
      have hih := ih (n - m) hlt hbase
      have hs := hN₀ (n - m) hbase
      rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel hmle] at hs
      rw [Nat.cast_sub hmle] at hih
      have hm0 : (m : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
      field_simp [hm0] at hih ⊢
      nlinarith

lemma rpow_le_rootLiminf_of_eventually_affine_log
    (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx : ∀ n, 0 < x n) (a B : ℝ)
    (h : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, a * n + B ≤ Real.log (x n)) :
    Real.exp a ≤ rootLiminf x := by
  sorry

lemma eventually_log_shift_of_lt_fixedShiftLiminf
    (x : ℕ → ℝ) (m : ℕ) (hx : ∀ n, 0 < x n) (a : ℝ)
    (ha : 0 < a) (hlt : a < fixedShiftLiminf x m) :
    ∀ᶠ n in atTop, Real.log a ≤ Real.log (x (n + m)) - Real.log (x n) := by
  contrapose! hlt with h_contra;
  refine' csSup_le _ _ <;> norm_num;
  · exact ⟨ 0, ⟨ 0, fun n hn => div_nonneg ( le_of_lt ( hx _ ) ) ( le_of_lt ( hx _ ) ) ⟩ ⟩;
  · intro b n hn; contrapose! h_contra; simp_all +decide [ Real.log_le_log_iff, le_div_iff₀, ne_of_gt ] ;
    exact ⟨ n, fun k hk => by rw [ ← Real.log_div ( ne_of_gt ( hx _ ) ) ( ne_of_gt ( hx _ ) ) ] ; exact Real.log_le_log ( by positivity ) ( by rw [ le_div_iff₀ ( hx _ ) ] ; nlinarith [ hn k hk, hx k, hx ( k + m ) ] ) ⟩

theorem liminf_root_ge_fixedShiftRatio : ∀ (x : ℕ → ℝ) (m : ℕ), 0 < m → (∀ k, 0 < x k) → 0 < fixedShiftLiminf x m → Real.rpow (fixedShiftLiminf x m) (1 / m) ≤ rootLiminf x := by
